## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Authored fixture exists under `fixtures/` or `fixtures/spec-semantics/`
- [ ] OpenAPI document validation passes
- [ ] JSON Schema runtime validation is documented when applicable
- [ ] README or fixture docs explain the scenario
